entity.summary: Singapore-based cryptocurrency exchange launched in May 2018 and rebranded into the successor exchange Bithumb Singapore on August 8, 2019.
entity.notes: The 2019-08-08 marker ends the Bitholic brand rather than the underlying Singapore exchange operation. Bithumb Singapore is modeled as a separate successor entity because HEI represents terminal rebrands with predecessor and successor records.

expected.summary: Singapore-based cryptocurrency exchange launched in May 2018 that was acquired and rebranded as Bithumb Singapore on 2019-08-08.
expected.notes: Terminal handling uses the 2019-08-08 public inactive/rebrand marker. Death reason is mapped to rebrand because Cryptowisser states that Bitholic was acquired by Bithumb Singapore and was thereafter known as Bithumb Singapore. HEI uses 2018-05-01 as a conservative launch marker from public launch announcements.

changes.summary: Singapore-based cryptocurrency exchange launched in May 2018 and rebranded into the successor exchange Bithumb Singapore on August 8, 2019.
changes.notes: The 2019-08-08 marker ends the Bitholic brand rather than the underlying Singapore exchange operation. Bithumb Singapore is modeled as a separate successor entity because HEI represents terminal rebrands with predecessor and successor records.

events.title: Bitholic launched in Singapore
events.description: Singapore fintech company RDMCHAIN launched the global crypto-to-crypto exchange Bitholic in May 2018.
events.notes: Month-level marker from the pre-launch company announcement.

events.title: Bitholic rebranded as Bithumb Singapore
events.description: The Bitholic brand ended when the Singapore exchange adopted the Bithumb Singapore identity under a partnership and trademark arrangement with Bithumb.
events.notes: The exchange operation continued through the separately modeled successor entity hei_ex_000592.

evidence.title: Global Crypto-Crypto Exchange Bitholic Opening Soon
evidence.notes: Company announcement states that the Singapore-based Bitholic exchange would start in May 2018.

evidence.title: Bitholic Now Bithumb Singapore
evidence.notes: Contemporaneous reporting documents the Bitholic-to-Bithumb Singapore transition.
